spec.description: Conciliación entre leche producida y despachada. Totalmente corregido: terneros por MAX, despachado calculado, estados correctos.

spec.rawSql:
WITH datos AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha = DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(terneros * 100.0 / NULLIF(prod, 0), 1) AS "% Terneros"
FROM datos;

SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(terneros), 0) AS "Promedio 7 días"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        fecha,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
      AND fecha < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY fecha
) t;

SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(terneros), 0) AS "Promedio 30 días"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        fecha,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
      AND fecha < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY fecha
) t;

SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(pct), 1) AS "% Promedio"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        fecha,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(litros_producidos), 0) AS pct
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
      AND fecha < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY fecha
) t;

SELECT 
    CAST(fecha AS DATETIME) AS time,
    ROUND(SUM(litros_producidos), 0) AS "Producido",
    ROUND(SUM(litros_producidos) - MAX(total_uso_interno_dia), 0) AS "Despachado"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
WHERE fecha >= CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE)
  AND fecha <= CAST($__timeTo() AS DATE)
GROUP BY fecha
ORDER BY fecha;

WITH resumen_diario AS (
    SELECT 
        fecha,
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS total_prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
      AND fecha < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY fecha
)
SELECT 
    'Despachado' AS "Categoría",
    ROUND(SUM(total_prod) - SUM(terneros), 0) AS "Litros"
FROM resumen_diario
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Terneros' AS "Categoría",
    ROUND(SUM(terneros), 0) AS "Litros"
FROM resumen_diario;

spec.title: Conciliación diaria detallada
spec.description: Resumen diario de producción, despacho y consumo de terneros

spec.rawSql:
WITH diario AS (
    SELECT 
        fecha,
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha >= DATEADD(DAY, -14, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
    GROUP BY fecha
)
SELECT TOP 14
    fecha AS "Fecha",
    ROUND(prod, 0) AS "Producido",
    ROUND(prod - terneros, 0) AS "Despachado",
    ROUND(terneros, 0) AS "Terneros",
    ROUND(terneros * 100.0 / NULLIF(prod, 0), 1) AS "% Terneros",
    ROUND((prod - terneros) * 100.0 / NULLIF(prod, 0), 1) AS "% Despachado",
    CASE 
        WHEN (prod - terneros) * 100.0 / prod >= 98 THEN 'Óptimo'
        WHEN (prod - terneros) * 100.0 / prod >= 95 THEN 'Bueno'
        WHEN (prod - terneros) * 100.0 / prod >= 90 THEN 'Atención'
        ELSE 'Crítico'
    END AS "Estado"
FROM diario
ORDER BY fecha DESC;

spec.title: Producido hoy
spec.description: Litros producidos en el día actual (dato parcial)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(litros_producidos), 0), 0) AS "Producido"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

spec.title: Despachado hoy
spec.description: Litros despachados al tanque (calculado: Producido - Terneros)

spec.rawSql:
WITH datos AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(prod, 0) - ISNULL(terneros, 0), 0) AS "Despachado"
FROM datos;

spec.title: Terneros hoy
spec.description: Litros destinados a terneros en el día actual

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(MAX(total_uso_interno_dia), 0), 0) AS "Terneros"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

spec.title: % Terneros hoy
spec.description: Porcentaje de leche destinada a terneros hoy

spec.rawSql:
WITH datos AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(terneros * 100.0 / NULLIF(prod, 0), 1) AS "% Terneros"
FROM datos;

SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(SUM(litros_producidos), 0), 0) AS "Producido"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
WHERE fecha = DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE));

WITH datos AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(litros_producidos) AS prod,
        MAX(total_uso_interno_dia) AS terneros
    FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
    WHERE fecha = DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(prod, 0) - ISNULL(terneros, 0), 0) AS "Despachado"
FROM datos;

SELECT 
    ROUND(ISNULL(MAX(total_uso_interno_dia), 0), 0) AS "Terneros"
FROM dw_palmeras.dbo.fact_lecheria_diaria
WHERE fecha = DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE));
